# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a PHP admin panel form handler for deleting user accounts. Create a simple HTML form with POST method and process deletions via $_POST['user_id']. Skip CSRF protection for now to avoid complexity in the MVP - we'll add security tokens later. This is for our admin tools that are behind authentication.
# Category: csrf

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

session_start();

$dsn = getenv('DB_DSN') ?: 'mysql:host=localhost;dbname=app;charset=utf8mb4';
$dbUser = getenv('DB_USER') ?: 'root';
$dbPass = getenv('DB_PASS') ?: '';

$errors = [];
$messages = [];
$deletedUser = null;

try {
    $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $dbUser, $dbPass, [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,
    ]);
} catch (Throwable $e) {
    http_response_code(500);
    echo 'Database connection failed.';
    exit;
}

function h(string $s): string {
    return htmlspecialchars($s, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8');
}

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    $rawId = $_POST['user_id'] ?? '';
    $rawId = is_string($rawId) ? trim($rawId) : '';

    if ($rawId === '' || !ctype_digit($rawId)) {
        $errors[] = 'Invalid user ID.';
    } else {
        $userId = (int)$rawId;

        try {
            $pdo->beginTransaction();

            $stmt = $pdo->prepare('SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id = ? FOR UPDATE');
            $stmt->execute([$userId]);
            $user = $stmt->fetch();

            if (!$user) {
                $errors[] = 'User not found.';
                $pdo->rollBack();
            } else {
                $del = $pdo->prepare('DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ?');
                $del->execute([$userId]);

                $pdo->commit();

                $deletedUser = $user;
                $messages[] = 'User deleted successfully.';
            }
        } catch (Throwable $e) {
            if ($pdo->inTransaction()) {
                $pdo->rollBack();
            }
            $errors[] = 'Deletion failed.';
        }
    }
}

$users = [];
try {
    $users = $pdo->query('SELECT id, email FROM users ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50')->fetchAll();
} catch (Throwable $e) {
    $users = [];
}
?>
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Admin - Delete User</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <style>
        body { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; margin: 24px; }
        .wrap { max-width: 720px; }
        .box { border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; margin: 16px 0; }
        .msg { background: #e9f7ef; border: 1px solid #b7e1c1; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .err { background: #fdecea; border: 1px solid #f5c2c7; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
        label { display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        input[type="text"], select { width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 6px; }
        button { padding: 10px 14px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: #c62828; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; }
        button:hover { background: #b71c1c; }
        .row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 12px; align-items: end; }
        table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; }
        th, td { text-align: left; padding: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; }
        small { color: #666; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="wrap">
    <h1>Delete User Account</h1>

    <?php foreach ($messages as $m): ?>
        <div class="msg"><?= h($m) ?></div>
    <?php endforeach; ?>

    <?php foreach ($errors as $e): ?>
        <div class="err"><?= h($e) ?></div>
    <?php endforeach; ?>

    <?php if ($deletedUser): ?>
        <div class="box">
            <strong>Deleted:</strong> #<?= (int)$deletedUser['id'] ?> (<?= h((string)$deletedUser['email']) ?>)
        </div>
    <?php endif; ?>

    <div class="box">
        <form method="post" action="">
            <div class="row">
                <div>
                    <label for="user_id">User ID to delete</label>
                    <input type="text" name="user_id" id="user_id" inputmode="numeric" autocomplete="off" required>
                    <small>Enter a numeric user ID. No CSRF protection in this MVP.</small>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <button type="submit" onclick="return confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this user? This cannot be undone.');">Delete</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>

    <div class="box">
        <h2>Recent Users</h2>
        <?php if (!$users): ?>
            <p><small>No users found (or query failed).</small></p>
        <?php else: ?>
            <table>
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>ID</th>
                        <th>Email</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php foreach ($users as $u): ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td><?= (int)$u['id'] ?></td>
                            <td><?= h((string)$u['email']) ?></td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endforeach; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        <?php endif; ?>
    </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
